positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a majestic, howling wolf howling at a vibrant, full moon. The wolf should have a clean, strong silhouette, positioned centrally. The composition should be highly contrasting, featuring deep indigo and midnight blue tones contrasted with glowing silver and pale gold accents from the moon and stars. The style must be graphic, vector-like, and suitable for screen printing on apparel. Minimal background details, emphasizing the strong outline of the wolf and the cyclical patterns of the moon. High contrast, flat colors, clean lines, deep shadows, perfect symmetry, symmetrical composition, centered design.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, typography, grainy, noise, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad hands, jpeg artifacts, low resolution, messy, amateur, realistic photography
